title: bromus secalinus var. multiflorus
intro: Bromus secalinus var. multiflorus, also known as jointed brome or hard brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Bromus secalinus var. multiflorus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
